evals.name: bounded-v2-crawl
evals.prompt: Plan a Firecrawl v2 crawl of a documentation site limited to /docs, with a 2,000-page cap and retained job status.
evals.expected_output: Defines bounded crawl scope, async status handling, and retained outputs.

evals.name: structured-extraction
evals.prompt: Extract product name, price, availability, and source URL across a site with Firecrawl v2 using a JSON schema.
evals.expected_output: Uses schema-shaped extraction with provenance and validation.

evals.name: map-before-scrape
evals.prompt: Map all product and pricing URLs first, then choose the smallest Firecrawl scrape set.
evals.expected_output: Separates URL mapping from scoped scraping.

evals.name: partial-failure
evals.prompt: A 5,000-page Firecrawl crawl has partial failures and rate limits; design the retry and evidence contract.
evals.expected_output: Handles job identity, partial failures, bounded retries, and output retention.

evals.name: native-web-boundary
evals.prompt: Decide whether Firecrawl should handle a one-off request to look up today's exchange rate with a citation.
evals.expected_output: Routes ordinary current-fact lookup to native Web rather than Firecrawl.
